description_long: This is a rectangular, single-story brick house with a flat roof and a simple, utilitarian design. The exterior walls are clad in reddish-brown brick with visible mortar lines, and the house features several large, white-framed windows on each side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple partitioned rooms and a central staircase, suggesting a functional floor plan. One side of the house has a prominent entryway with a staircase leading up to a door, indicating the main entrance. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some grouped together and others spaced apart. The overall appearance is modern and minimalistic, with no decorative elements or overhangs.
description: A single-story brick house with a flat roof, large white-framed windows, and a central staircase entryway. The design is modern, minimalistic, and functional.
description_view_0: This view shows the house's brick facade with three large windows and a glimpse of the interior partition walls.
description_view_1: This side features a single window and the main entryway with an exterior staircase leading up to the door.
description_view_2: This view displays two large windows and a clear look at the interior room divisions and staircase.
description_view_3: This side has two windows spaced apart, with a plain brick wall and no visible entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with exterior staircase, simple door, no porch or decorative elements
